description:
Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the smmccabe/docker:latest Docker image and defines two stages: build and deploy. Add a build job in the build stage that runs `npm install` then `npm run build` and publishes the `dist/` directory as an artifact. Add a deploy-live job in the deploy stage, limited to the master branch and targeting the live environment, that executes `which ssh-agent || ( apt-get update -y && apt-get install openssh-client -y )`, `eval $(ssh-agent -s)`, `ssh-add <(echo "$DEPLOY_KEY")`, `mkdir -p ~/.ssh`, `[[ -f /.dockerenv ]] && echo -e "Host *
	StrictHostKeyChecking no

" > ~/.ssh/config`, and finally `rsync -av --no-perms --no-owner --no-group --exclude-from '.gitlab-ci-rsync-exclude.txt' --exclude '.git' --delete ./ jbennest@allidoisscoregoals.com:/home/brock/web/` to sync the built files to the remote server.
